SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io.vsam

Class AbstractRecordRelativeFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.AbstractVsamFile
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.AbstractRecordRelativeFile
Direct Known Subclasses:
RecordRelativeFile
public abstract class AbstractRecordRelativeFile extends AbstractVsamFile
Represents an abstract base class for handling relative record datasets (RRDS) in a VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organization. This class provides methods for performing file operations such as reading, starting file access, and managing records with relative record numbers (RRN). It is designed to be extended by more specific implementations for RRDS files.

    • AbstractRecordRelativeFile

      public AbstractRecordRelativeFile(Context context, FileDescriptor fileDescriptor)
      Constructor for creating an instance of AbstractRecordRelativeFile with the specified context and file descriptor.
      Parameters:
      context - the context in which the file is accessed
      fileDescriptor - the descriptor for the file being referenced

    • AbstractRecordRelativeFile

      public AbstractRecordRelativeFile(Context context, String ddName)
      Constructs an instance of AbstractRecordRelativeFile with the specified context and DD name. This constructor initializes the object for accessing a relative file based on the specified data definition name (DD name).
      Parameters:
      context - the context in which the relative file is being accessed
      ddName - the data definition name (

  • Method Details

    • relativeKeyIs

      public AbstractRecordRelativeFile relativeKeyIs(AbstractNNumeric relativeKey)
      Sets the RRN key for the file and returns the current instance.
      Parameters:
      relativeKey - the relative key to be assigned for this file
      Returns:
      the current instance of AbstractRecordRelativeFile for method chaining

    • getLastReadPosition

      public Object getLastReadPosition()
      Retrieves the position of the last read record within the file. If no record has been read, returns -1.
      Specified by:
      getLastReadPosition in class AbstractFile
      Returns:
      the value of the last read record's position as a long, or -1 if no record has been read

    • open

      public FileIOResponse open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode) throws FileIOException
      Opens the file with the specified access and lock modes.
      Overrides:
      open in class AbstractVsamFile
      Parameters:
      openMode - the mode in which the file is to be opened (e.g., read, write, append)
      lockMode - the locking mode for the file (e.g., shared, exclusive)
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse indicating the success or failure of the operation
      Throws:
      FileIOException

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read()
      Reads the file using the RRN field.
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(boolean update)
      Reads a record from the file with the specified update mode.
      Parameters:
      update - indicates whether the record is to be updated after the read operation; true for updating the record, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status of the operation and any data retrieved.

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(AbstractNNumeric rrn)
      Reads a record from the file based on the specified relative record number (RRN).
      Parameters:
      rrn - the relative record number used to locate the record to be read
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status of the operation and any data retrieved

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(AbstractNNumeric rrn, boolean equal)
      Reads a record from the file based on the specified relative record number (RRN) and an equality condition, with no update applied during the operation.
      Parameters:
      rrn - the relative record number used to locate the record to be read
      equal - a boolean indicating whether to apply equality filtering to the record selection
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status of the operation and any data retrieved

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(AbstractNNumeric rrn, boolean equal, boolean update)
      Reads a file record based on the specified relative record number (RRN), equality condition, and update flag. This method delegates the read operation to an internal implementation using the `Rrn` representation of the relative record number.
      Parameters:
      rrn - the relative record number used to locate the record to be read
      equal - a boolean indicating whether to apply equality filtering to the record selection
      update - a boolean indicating whether the record should be updated during or after the read operation
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status of the operation and any retrieved data

    • read

      public abstract FileIOResponse read(Rrn rrn, boolean equal, boolean update)
      Reads a record from the file based on the specified relative record number (RRN), equality condition

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn)
      Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN). This method performs the read operation with default equality and update conditions.
      Parameters:
      into - the data field where the content of the read record will be stored
      rrn - the relative record number of the record to be read
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status and any data retrieved

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn, boolean equal, boolean update)
      Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN), equality condition, and update flag. This method performs the read operation and updates the specified field with the record's data if the operation is successful.
      Parameters:
      into - the data field where the content of the read record will be stored; if null, no data will be updated
      rrn - the relative record number of the record to be read
      equal - a boolean indicating whether to apply equality filtering to the record selection
      update - a boolean indicating whether the record should be updated during or after the read operation
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse representing the result of the read operation, including the status of the operation and any data retrieved

    • start

      public abstract FileIOResponse start(Rrn rrn, KeyIs mode)
      Starts the file browse from the specified RRN
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Rrn key to start from
      mode - the mode in which the file operation should be performed
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse containing the outcome of the operation

    • start

      public FileIOResponse start(NInteger rrn, KeyIs mode)
      Starts the file browse from the specified RRN
      Parameters:
      rrn - the RRN key to start from
      mode - the mode in which the file operation should be performed
      Returns:
      a FileIOResponse containing the outcome of the operation
